home_meta_title: Snapvie - Download YouTube Videos in 4K and 8K HDR | Free Online Tool
home_meta_description: Download YouTube videos and playlists in 4K, 8K HDR for free. No ads, no malware. Supports 4K, 8K HDR, MP4, and playlist batch download. Fast, safe, and free.
privacy_meta_description: Privacy policy for Snapvie - free online video downloader. Learn how we handle your data and protect your privacy.

home_step2_desc: Drop it into our mega input bar above. It glows when it's ready!
home_step3_desc: Click fetch and enjoy high quality video offline, anywhere.
home_tools_subtitle: We built shiny tools to make your life easier. Choose your fighter.
home_tool_extension_desc: Adds a cute "Fetch" button right under every video player.
home_tool_bookmarklet_desc: No install needed. Drag this pill to your bookmarks bar!
home_tool_script_desc: For Tampermonkey users. Get raw control.
home_testimonials_subtitle: Don't just take our word for it. Join thousands of happy fetchers who save time every day.
home_testimonial_sarah_quote: "My grandma uses this! It's literally the only downloader she doesn't call me for help with."
home_testimonial_mike_quote: "I save recipe videos for the kitchen where the WiFi doesn't reach. A literal lifesaver."
home_why_usp1_desc: Download in the highest resolution available — 360p up to 4320p (8K), SDR and HDR.
home_why_usp2_desc: Paste a playlist URL, select the videos you want, and batch-download them all at once.
home_why_usp3_desc: Shorts download the same way as regular videos — just paste the link.
home_why_usp4_desc: Choose video stream, audio-only MP4/WebM, or let Snapvie mux them into a single file.
home_quality_hdr_list: SDR · HDR10 · HDR10+ · Dolby Vision (where available)
home_quality_note: Available quality depends on what YouTube provides for each video.
home_faq_q1: Can Snapvie download YouTube videos in 8K HDR?
home_faq_a1: Yes. Snapvie fetches all streams YouTube exposes for a video. If the uploader provided an 8K or HDR stream, you will see it in the format picker. Note that 8K and HDR streams are video-only on YouTube — Snapvie will mux them with audio automatically.
home_faq_q2: Why does a video only show 360p or 1080p options?
home_faq_a2: YouTube sometimes limits stream availability based on the original upload quality, age-restriction, or geo-restriction. Snapvie shows exactly what YouTube makes available — it cannot produce quality that does not exist on YouTube's servers.
home_faq_q3: How do I download a full YouTube playlist?
home_faq_a3: Enable Playlist Mode on the homepage, paste the playlist URL, then click Fetch. Snapvie will load all videos in the queue. You can select which ones to download and choose the quality before starting the batch.
home_faq_a4: Yes. YouTube Shorts are standard videos internally. Paste the Shorts URL the same way as any other YouTube URL.
home_faq_a5: Yes, Snapvie is completely free. There are no ads shown during the download process and no hidden fees.
download_btn_mux_status_queued_front: First in queue, waiting for a free worker...
download_btn_mux_status_leased_waiting: Worker picked up the job and is preparing the pipeline...
download_btn_mux_status_leased: Worker is picking up the job and starting the pipeline...
download_btn_mux_status_processing_fetch: Fetching video and audio from source...
download_btn_mux_status_processing_muxin: Muxing video streams on the server...
download_btn_mux_status_processing_final: Finalizing the file and preparing the ticket...
download_btn_mux_status_processing_runni: The job is still running normally and is almost done...
download_btn_mux_status_ready: File is ready, fetching the download link...
download_btn_mux_status_expired: The mux job expired before download.
download_btn_legal_prefix: By using Snapvie, you accept our
privacy_section_1_body: Welcome to Snapvie. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our video downloader service.
privacy_info_video_urls_body: When you use our service, we temporarily process the video URLs you submit to extract download information. These URLs are not stored permanently on our servers.
privacy_info_usage_data_body: We collect anonymous usage statistics including pages visited, features used, and error reports to improve our service.
privacy_info_device_info_body: We collect technical information such as browser type, operating system, and device type to optimize your experience.
privacy_info_cookies_body: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience and improve site performance. See our Cookie Policy below for details.
privacy_section_3_intro: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
privacy_section_3_item_1: To provide and maintain our video downloading service
privacy_section_3_item_2: To improve and optimize our website performance
privacy_section_3_item_3: To analyze usage patterns and trends
privacy_section_3_item_4: To detect and prevent abuse of our service
privacy_section_4_body_1: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our service and hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data that may include an anonymous unique identifier.
privacy_cookie_essential_body: Required for the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled.
privacy_cookie_analytics_body: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.
privacy_cookie_preference_body: Remember your settings and provide a more consistent experience across visits.
privacy_section_4_body_2: You can manage your cookie preferences through the consent banner that appears when you first visit our site, or by clearing your browser cookies.
privacy_section_5_intro: We use the following third-party services:
privacy_service_google_body: For website analytics and usage statistics.
privacy_service_cloudflare_body: For website security and performance optimization.
privacy_section_6_body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy_section_7_intro: We retain your information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy:
privacy_section_7_item_1: Video URLs are processed in real-time and not stored permanently
privacy_section_7_item_2: Analytics data is retained for up to 26 months
privacy_section_7_item_3: Cookie consent preferences are stored until you clear your browser data
privacy_section_8_intro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy_right_access_body: Request a copy of your personal data
privacy_right_erasure_body: Request deletion of your personal data
privacy_right_object_body: Object to processing of your personal data
privacy_section_8_outro: To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided below.
privacy_section_9_body: Our service is not intended for use by children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you become aware that a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.
privacy_section_10_body: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.
privacy_section_11_intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
privacy_section_12_intro: For users in the European Economic Area (EEA), we comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Our legal basis for processing personal data is:
privacy_gdpr_legitimate_interest_body: For essential service functionality and security
privacy_section_12_outro: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority if you believe our processing of your personal data violates applicable law.

mux_job_detail_keep_tab_open: Keep this tab open until the download starts.
mux_job_detail_queued_waiting: Job {jobId} is waiting for an available worker.
mux_job_detail_queued_front: Job {jobId} is first in line and waiting for the next available worker.
mux_job_detail_queued_position: Job {jobId} has {count} queued job(s) ahead of it.
mux_job_detail_queued_received: Job {jobId} has entered the queue and should be picked up soon.
mux_job_detail_leased: Job {jobId} is starting the mux pipeline and preparing the artifact.
mux_job_detail_processing_fetching_strea: Job {jobId} is pulling video/audio from upstream.
mux_job_detail_processing_muxing: Job {jobId} is combining fragments into the final file.
mux_job_detail_processing_finalizing: Job {jobId} is sealing the file and preparing the download ticket.
mux_job_detail_processing_still_running: Job {jobId} is still running normally and may just need a bit more time.
mux_job_detail_ready: Job {jobId} is done and moving to the download step.
mux_job_detail_expired: Job {jobId} expired before the download started.
mux_job_detail_missing_params: The launcher link is invalid or missing required query parameters.
mux_job_detail_creating: The frontend is forwarding this request to the worker pipeline.
mux_job_detail_waiting_worker: Job {jobId} is muxing and uploading the artifact.
mux_job_detail_starting_download: If the browser does not start downloading automatically, check blocked download popups.
url_input_error_invalid_url: Please enter a valid YouTube URL.
url_input_error_clipboard_unavailable: Could not access clipboard. Please paste manually.
api_extract_error_playlist_channel: This link is a playlist or channel. Open a specific video and try again.
api_extract_error_restricted: This video has restricted access (private, age-restricted, or members-only). Try a public video.

api_extract_request_failed_after_retries: Extraction request failed after multiple retries.

api_mux_file_ticket_failed: Failed to get mux file ticket ({status}).
api_mux_job_expired: Mux job expired before the download completed.
about_what_is_p1: Snapvie is a free YouTube video downloader that lets you save videos, playlists, and Shorts in up to 8K HDR quality — directly from your browser, with no ads or account required.
about_what_is_p2: We built Snapvie because most downloader tools are slow, full of ads, or cap quality at 720p. Snapvie doesn't do any of that. It fetches the highest quality YouTube offers and delivers it cleanly.
about_supports_4k_desc: download in full original quality, no compression
about_supports_playlists_desc: batch download entire YouTube playlists at once
about_supports_audio_desc: extract audio as a clean file without video
about_supports_no_account_desc: paste a URL and download, that's it
about_how_works_p1: The process is straightforward: you paste a YouTube URL, Snapvie extracts all available streams (video-only, audio-only, and combined formats), and you pick the one you want. For high-resolution formats (1080p and above), YouTube serves video and audio as separate streams — Snapvie handles the muxing on the server so you get a single, ready-to-play file.
about_how_works_p2: For playlists, Snapvie processes each video individually, letting you select quality and format per video or batch-download with a preferred setting.
about_built_quality_p1: YouTube delivers high-resolution video (1080p+) as separate DASH streams — one for video, one for audio. Most downloaders either skip this entirely (capping at 720p) or re-encode the result, losing quality. Snapvie muxes the original streams without re-encoding, preserving every bit of the original upload.
about_built_quality_realtime_desc: video and audio merged on the fly, no re-encoding
about_built_quality_no_ads: No ads, no popups, no dark patterns
about_built_quality_any_browser_desc: desktop or mobile, no extension required
about_mission_p1: To provide safe, ad-free, high-quality video downloads for personal and educational use — without compromising user experience or privacy.
about_mission_disclaimer: Snapvie is provided as a tool for lawful personal use only. We do not host, store, or distribute any copyrighted content. Users are responsible for complying with applicable laws and the terms of the content platforms they use.
about_privacy_p1: We don't sell your data. We don't profile users. Snapvie uses minimal analytics (Plausible/Umami-style) to understand traffic patterns. No personal data is stored beyond what your browser session requires.
about_learn_more_guides_desc: step-by-step tutorials for common download tasks
contact_support_p1: Having trouble downloading a video? Can't find the quality you expected? We're here to help.
contact_support_include: Please include the video URL, your browser, and a brief description of the issue.
contact_bugs_p1: Found a bug or broken feature? Please include:
contact_bugs_item1: The video URL you were trying to download
contact_bugs_item2: What happened (error message, blank result, etc.)
contact_bugs_email: Send bug reports to: support@snapvie.com with subject line "Bug Report".
contact_dmca_p1: If you are a copyright holder and believe that content accessible via Snapvie infringes your rights, please review our DMCA policy.
contact_dmca_email: DMCA notices must be submitted via email to: dmca@snapvie.com
contact_other_p1: For anything else — partnerships, press, or general feedback — reach us at: hello@snapvie.com
terms_s1_p1: By using Snapvie ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use the Service.
terms_s2_p1: Snapvie is provided for personal and educational use only. You may use the Service to:
terms_s2_allowed1: Download videos for offline personal viewing
terms_s2_allowed2: Save content for educational or research purposes
terms_s2_p2: You may not use Snapvie to:
terms_s2_denied1: Commercially redistribute, sell, or monetize downloaded content
terms_s2_denied2: Upload downloaded content to other platforms without rights to do so
terms_s2_denied3: Scrape or automate requests to our service in ways that harm availability
terms_s2_denied4: Circumvent technical measures in a way that violates applicable law
terms_s3_p1: You are solely responsible for ensuring that your use of downloaded content complies with applicable copyright laws and the terms of the content platform.
terms_s3_p2: Downloading copyrighted material without authorization may violate the rights of content creators and applicable law. Snapvie does not encourage or condone copyright infringement.
terms_s4_p1: Snapvie is provided "as-is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, error-free operation, or that all content will be downloadable.
terms_s4_p2: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the Service at any time without prior notice.
terms_s5_p1: You use the Service at your own risk. Snapvie shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the Service, including but not limited to loss of data, system failures, or legal claims.
terms_s6_p1: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of Snapvie after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms. We recommend checking this page periodically.
terms_s7_p1: Questions about these Terms? Contact us at: support@snapvie.com
dmca_overview_p1: Snapvie respects intellectual property rights and complies with the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA). Snapvie does not host, store, or distribute any media files. All downloads are processed in real-time from publicly available sources.
dmca_overview_p2: If you believe content accessible via Snapvie infringes your copyrighted work, you may submit a DMCA takedown notice.
dmca_notice_p1: To submit a valid DMCA notice, please include the following information:
dmca_notice_item1: Identification of the copyrighted work you claim has been infringed
dmca_notice_item2: Identification of the infringing material and information sufficient to locate it
dmca_notice_item3: Your contact information (name, address, phone number, email)
dmca_notice_item4: A statement that you have a good faith belief that the use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law
dmca_notice_item5: A statement, under penalty of perjury, that the information in the notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act on behalf of the owner
dmca_notice_p2: We will review valid notices and take appropriate action, which may include blocking access to the reported content via our service.
dmca_counter_p1: If you believe your content was wrongly restricted, you may submit a counter-notification including:
dmca_counter_item1: Identification of the material that was restricted and the location at which it previously appeared
dmca_counter_item2: A statement under penalty of perjury that you have a good faith belief the material was restricted as a result of mistake or misidentification
dmca_counter_item3: Your name, address, phone number, and consent to the jurisdiction of the federal court in your district
dmca_counter_p2: Upon receiving a valid counter-notification, we may restore access to the material in question, unless the original complainant files a court action.
dmca_repeat_p1: Snapvie reserves the right to terminate access for users who are repeat infringers, in accordance with the DMCA.
